identified_vulnerabilities.name: Prompt Injection Vulnerability
identified_vulnerabilities.description: Model can be manipulated to override system instructions or safeguards.

identified_vulnerabilities.name: Model Bias and Fairness Issues
identified_vulnerabilities.description: Model generates biased or discriminatory responses across categories.

recommendations: Regularly audit model outputs across demographic groups
Continuously test model against evolving jailbreak techniques
Immediate mitigation required: prioritize fixing high-risk vulnerabilities
Use system prompt isolation and instruction hierarchy enforcement
Implement strict input validation and prompt sanitization
Implement bias detection and correction pipelines
Use balanced and diverse datasets during training

approval.summary: High-risk model behavior detected. Risk Score: 4.0. Issues: Prompt Injection Vulnerability, Model Bias and Fairness Issues
